status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
alternate_names: 国家互联网信息办公室
notes: China's internet/cyberspace super-regulator, established 2014 (successor to the State Internet Information Office). Operates under a 'one institution, two names' arrangement as the public-facing name of the Office of the Central Cyberspace Affairs Commission. Responsible for content-moderation enforcement, cybersecurity oversight, data-security and cross-border-transfer regulation, and AI governance rulemaking. See registry/regulation/cn/gov/cac.json for the regulations/measures it issues.
